info.title: SagaForge Story Workbench API
info.description: Transactional Story, World, RAG, job, and artifact services.

get.description: Comprehensive health information including GPU, memory, and cache status.
Detailed system status

Readiness probe for Kubernetes/Docker.
Returns 200 if essential components are available.

Prometheus-style metrics endpoint
Basic metrics for monitoring and alerting

post.description:
Text chat completion using LLM

- **messages**: Conversation history with roles (system/user/assistant)
- **parameters**: Chat parameters (max_length, temperature, etc.)

Streaming chat completion (SSE)

Returns Server-Sent Events for real-time response

get.description: List available chat models

delete.description: Unload specific chat model to free memory

post.description:
Test system prompt with a user message

Useful for prompt engineering and testing persona behavior

Analyze a document using LLM to extract summary, tags, and key entities.
Returns suggested metadata and content preview for the user to review.

Add a raw text document into the RAG index.

- 由 engine 負責切 chunk + 建立向量。
- 回傳的 chunks_created 為估算值（方便前端/監控用）。

Upload a file, run it through DocumentProcessor, and add it to the RAG index.

典型用在：上傳 PDF / TXT / DOCX 之類，抽出文字 + metadata 後寫入 RAG。

Upload a file and ingest it into RAG as a background job.

- API 只負責接收檔案並建立 job
- 實際的文字抽取/embedding/寫入索引交給 Celery worker
- 前端可用 `/jobs/{job_id}` 輪詢進度、取消

Upload multiple files (or a single zip) and ingest into RAG as a background job.

- 支援多檔選取、拖拉多檔
- zip 會在 worker 端解壓後批次匯入（忽略不支援的副檔名）
Vector search over indexed chunks.

Return raw RAG context and sources for downstream LLM/agents.

這個 endpoint 給其他 router（像 /llm/rag_chat 或 agents）直接拿 context 用，
不主動產生回答。

Ingest structured data (like role settings or world info) into RAG.
The content is expected to be a pre-formatted Markdown string or structured text.

RAG-enhanced question answering.

流程：
1. 用 RAG engine 取回最相關的 context。
2. 把 context + 使用者問題包成一個嚴謹的 QA prompt 丟給 LLM。
3. 回傳回答 + 原始 context + sources。

get.description: Get RAG engine statistics.

post.description: Rebuild FAISS / BM25 index from current documents (job-based by default).

parameters.name: session_id

schema.description: Optional story session to attach artifacts
schema.title: Session Id

parameters.description: Optional story session to attach artifacts

parameters.name: turn

schema.description: Optional story turn number for artifact attachment
schema.title: Turn

parameters.description: Optional story turn number for artifact attachment

delete.description: Clear RAG index and all documents (dev / reset only).

get.description: List logical documents (grouping chunks by parent_doc_id).

delete.description:
Delete a logical document from RAG index.

作法：
- 先把所有對應 chunks 從 rag_engine.documents 移除。
- 再呼叫 rebuild_index() 重新建立 FAISS / BM25。

Clear all logical documents/chunks for a given world_id.

- 移除該 world 的所有 chunks
- 重建 index（若還有其他 world 的資料）

post.description:
Batch add documents to RAG index.

request.documents 預期是 list[dict]，每個 dict 至少包含 doc_id / content。

get.description: Return Story orchestrator catalog (sub-agents/tools/default profile) for UI.
List all available agent tools from the default agent's registry.

post.description: List all available agent tools directly from the global tool registry.
Execute a single tool call.
Execute multiple tools in parallel.
Execute a complex task with the default reasoning agent.
Execute a task using the advanced reasoning agent (with reflection & QA).

get.description: Get current status and configuration of the default agent.
Get current status and configuration of the advanced agent.

post.description: Reload agent tools from configuration (recreate default & advanced agents).
Create a new multi-step task.
Automatically plan steps for a multi-step task.
Execute a multi-step task.

get.description: Get status of a multi-step task.
List all active multi-step tasks.

post.description: Process a player action within a story context.
Generate a detailed scene description.
Process complex story scenarios using multiple agents.

get.description: List all active story contexts.
Get agent system information and statistics.

post.description: Configure tool-specific settings (currently only web_search).

get.description: Health check for agent system components.

post.description: Create new text adventure game session
Take an action in the game

get.description: List game sessions

schema.title: Response List Game Sessions Api V1 Game Sessions Get

get.description: Get game session details
List available game personas

schema.title: Response List Personas Api V1 Game Personas Get

get.description: Get detailed game statistics
Get detailed system information

post.description: Load/unload models

get.description: Get job status by id (auto-progress for simulated jobs).

delete.description: Best-effort cancel a job (revokes celery task if tracked).

get.description: List all jobs (with simulated progress).

post.description: Submit a new task to the queue.

get.description: Get the status of a specific task.

post.description: Cancel a queued or running task.

get.description: Get queue statistics.
List recent tasks, optionally filtered by status.

post.description: Create a new story session with optional RAG and agent assist.

Enqueue a Story turn as a background job (GPU worker recommended).

The worker updates the session file; frontend should poll `/jobs/{job_id}` and
refetch `/story/session/{session_id}` once completed.
Process a story turn, optionally enriching with RAG and agent output.

Process a story turn with SSE streaming for narrative text.

Returns an EventSource stream where:
  - `data: {"type": "token", "content": "..."}` — narrative text tokens
  - `data: {"type": "done", "result": {...}}`     — final complete result
Create a save slot for the current session.

get.description: List all save slots for a session.

post.description: Load a specific save slot into the session.

get.description: Get the narrative flowchart data.
List story sessions.

schema.title: Response List Story Sessions Api V1 Story Sessions Get

get.description: Get story session detail with current game state.
Get enhanced context snapshot for a story session.
Get the session-level agent_profile used by Story Orchestrator (does not read worldpack).

put.description: Replace the session-level agent_profile (takes effect next turn).

patch.description: Patch the session-level agent_profile (takes effect next turn).

post.description: Apply the latest WorldPack changes to an ongoing story session (enhanced mode).

Suggest a WorldPack patch based on what's emerged in the current story session.

注意：此 endpoint 只產生「預覽」與 patch，不會直接寫回 worldpack / RAG；
需要前端明確確認後，才保存 worldpack 或寫入知識庫。
Preview choice consequences.

get.description: Export story session data.

post.description: Import story session data.

get.description: Return story system metrics plus integration readiness.

post.description: Provide agent-assisted narrative without mutating session state.
Expose RAG search for story support.

get.description: List available story personas.
List available story templates.
List available world settings (legacy alias for WorldPacks).
Get detailed world setting info (legacy alias for WorldPacks).
List all available character classes.
Get detailed class info.
List available worlds for selector UI.

schema.title: Response List Worlds Api V1 Worlds Get

post.description: Create a new worldpack.

get.description: Get full worldpack detail.

post.description:
Multi-agent World Studio endpoint:
- 讀取目前 worldpack
- 取出 world_id 對應的 RAG snippets（best-effort）
- 以多個子代理產生 patch，回傳預覽或直接套用保存

runtime_preset_id.title: Runtime Preset Id
runtime_preset_id.description: Runtime preset override (LLM/T2I). None/empty = follow world default.

enrich_with_rag.title: Enrich With Rag
enrich_with_rag.description: Augment prompts with RAG knowledge (None = auto by world/session default)

rag_mode.title: Rag Mode
rag_mode.description: RAG mode override (auto/on/off). When provided, takes precedence over enrich_with_rag.

rerank_mode.title: Rerank Mode
rerank_mode.description: Reranker mode override (auto/on/off). When auto, follows world default.

player_template_id.title: Player Template Id
player_template_id.description: Optional player style template id (from WorldPack.player_templates)

include_image.title: Include Image
include_image.description: Whether to attempt auto scene image generation

runtime_preset_id.title: Runtime Preset Id
runtime_preset_id.description: Runtime preset id used by this session (effective)

player_template_id.description: Optional player template id chosen at session start

worldpack_updated_at.title: Worldpack Updated At
worldpack_updated_at.description: Last worldpack updated_at applied into this session (set on init/sync)

turn_job_id.description: Active Story turn job id (if a turn is currently running)

rag_mode.description: RAG mode derived from rag_auto/enrich_with_rag (for UI convenience)
